summary: Common CHOP workflow snippets for channel manipulation, audio analysis, sensor smoothing, and parameter control.
examples: chop_smooth_sensor: Smooth noisy sensor input with Filter CHOP and Lag CHOP
chop_audio_analysis: Extract audio bands using Audio Spectrum CHOP and Math CHOP
chop_lfo_modulation: Use LFO CHOP to modulate parameters with sine/ramp waves
chop_timer_sequence: Multi-segment Timer CHOP with callbacks for show control
